scripts.dev: pnpm run types build && pnpm run emails build && concurrently "pnpm run types dev" "pnpm run emails dev:watch" "pnpm run server dev" "pnpm run client dev:turbo"
scripts.build: pnpm run types build && pnpm run emails build && pnpm run server build && pnpm run client build
scripts.lint: pnpm run client lint && pnpm run server lint
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm run client lint:fix && pnpm run server lint:fix
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run types build && pnpm run emails build && pnpm run server tsc && pnpm run client tsc
scripts.verify: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build
